summary: Iteration 47 testing completed for Notification Center bug fix and relative timestamp feature. All tests PASSED. The user-reported bug 'je n'arrive pas à cliquer sur les notifications' is FIXED. Clicking notification items now works correctly - dropdown closes and navigates to the correct tab.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing notification counts from database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 47 verified the notification center bug fix. Key findings: (1) Clicking notification items (testid=notif-item-{key}) now works - dropdown closes and navigates to correct tab. (2) Backdrop (testid=notif-center-backdrop) closes dropdown when clicked. (3) Clicking header text keeps dropdown open (stopPropagation works). (4) 'Tout marquer lu' (testid=notif-mark-all-read) clears all badges and closes dropdown. (5) Relative timestamps (testid=notif-item-{key}-ts) display correctly: 'à l'instant', 'il y a X min', 'il y a X h', 'il y a X j'. (6) Backend returns latest_by_category with ISO-8601 timestamps for all roles.

tests: Admin: Click notif-item-invoices → dropdown closes, navigates to BONS tab
Manager: Click notif-item-invoices → dropdown closes, navigates to BONS tab
Backdrop click closes dropdown without navigation
Header text click keeps dropdown open (stopPropagation works)
'Tout marquer lu' clears all badges and closes dropdown
Timestamps display correctly: 'il y a 6 j', 'il y a 5 h', 'il y a 2 j', 'il y a 14 j'
formatRelativeTime helper: <1min='à l'instant', 1-59min='il y a X min', 1-23h='il y a X h', 1-29d='il y a X j'
GET /api/notifications/counts?role=manager returns latest_by_category with 4 keys (expenses, purchase_orders, invoices, notes)
All timestamps are ISO-8601 format or empty string
Dropdown has z-[100] and is above all other elements
Backdrop has z-[90] and captures outside clicks
Badge ping animation has pointer-events-none (doesn't intercept bell clicks)
Tab badges still work with effectiveCounts
Badge count updates after marking notifications as read

screenshots: .screenshots/iter47_initial_state.png - Admin logged in with badge showing 30
.screenshots/iter47_after_item_click.png - After clicking notification (navigated to BONS tab)
.screenshots/iter47_manager_initial.png - Manager logged in with badge showing 23
